/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_mac_fapi_fastpath_adaptor.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_mac_fapi_fastpath_adaptor.dir/mac_fapi_fastpath_adaptor_factory_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_mac_fapi_fastpath_adaptor.dir/mac_fapi_fastpath_adaptor_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_mac_fapi_fastpath_adaptor.dir/mac_fapi_sector_fastpath_adaptor_impl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_mac_fapi_fastpath_adaptor.a
